question: Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to create a double exposure effect in Photoshop with a person and a snowy mountain overlapping, to show off on my social media. Can you teach me step by step how to do it? It would be best if each step includes a screenshot of the operation interface or an effect preview so I can follow along easily. Around 4-5 steps should be enough.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I recently shot a set of studio portraits, and the model has quite a lot of skin details. I want to learn the frequency separation skin retouching technique that preserves skin texture. Give me a detailed illustrated tutorial, from how to separate frequencies to the final brush blending. Each step should have corresponding before-and-after comparison images—provide at least 3 images to show me the specific changes.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This weekend I want to set up a miniature moss terrarium at home. I've prepared some nerve plants (Fittonia), leucobryum moss (white cushion moss), and some akadama soil. Help me write illustrated step-by-step instructions from laying the base substrate to landscaping. Include an image for each completed layer or key step so I can see roughly what it should look like.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I bought a set of hardline water cooling components and I'm planning to build my own PC, but I have no clue about tube bending and routing. Give me an illustrated hardline water cooling installation tutorial, with step-by-step instructions and images from heating and bending the tubes to the final filling and leak testing. Show me at least 4 real photos of key stages.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My daughter's birthday is next week, and I want to challenge myself to make a three-tier ocean-themed fondant cake. Give me detailed step-by-step instructions, including how to make gradient blue fondant covering and the details for sculpting sea turtles and coral. Each major step should include both text and images, with at least 4 images, so I can have a clear picture in my mind.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I captured an aerial overhead view of a city with a drone and want to use post-processing software to create that toy miniature model look (tilt-shift effect). Teach me how to adjust the colors and add blur filters, with step-by-step instructions. Include an effect image for each step, and compare the original photo with the final toy-like result.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to learn how to fold that kind of extremely complex 3D fire-breathing dragon origami, the type that's folded from a single square sheet of paper. Can you give me a step-by-step illustrated tutorial organized by stages? For example, folding the base form, folding the wings, folding the head—each stage should come with a clear image of the folding process. Don't just throw together a bunch of random disconnected images to fool me.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: The drywall in my living room has been hit and now has a fist-sized hole. I want to buy materials and repair it myself. Write me a repair tutorial covering everything from applying mesh tape, spreading joint compound, to sanding and painting. Each step should include on-site construction images, guiding me with illustrated instructions throughout.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I've recently gotten into woodworking and want to carve a wooden spoon from a block of walnut wood. Help me plan out the steps, from marking lines, rough hollowing the bowl, shaping the exterior, to sanding and oiling. Include an image showing the current state of the wood for each step, interleaving text and images, so I can understand the carving techniques and progress.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I've been working at a desk for a long time and have severe rounded shoulders and kyphosis. Create a customized at-home stretching tutorial with 4 exercises to improve my posture. Each exercise should include demonstration images with a real person, and provide detailed explanations of the key engagement points and common mistakes in both the text and images.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to graft lemon branches from my home onto a pomelo tree. I've heard that the 'cleft grafting' method has a high survival rate. Please give me a detailed illustrated operation guide, from shaping the scion, splitting the rootstock, to wrapping. Each step must have clear close-up images of the specific areas, otherwise I'm afraid I might cut in the wrong position.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I bought a nice piece of plaid fabric and want to make a pleated skirt myself (the JK uniform style). Give me a beginner-friendly illustrated tutorial covering everything from measuring and marking lines, pressing the pleats, to attaching the waistband. Include an image showing the fabric's state after completing each major step, approximately 4-5 images in total.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I just got a flat tire on the highway. I have a spare tire and a jack in the trunk, but I've never changed a tire by myself before. Please give me an emergency tire-changing guide with illustrated step-by-step instructions, from locating the jack point to lift the car body to removing and installing the lug nuts. Include an image for each step, the more detailed the better—this is an emergency!

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to learn watercolor painting—teach me how to paint a kingfisher. From pencil sketching, laying down base washes, detailing the feathers, to adding the final eye highlights, give me a step-by-step illustrated tutorial. Each step should include a progress image on the paper, ideally showcasing that characteristic watercolor wash and bleeding effect.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to create a Japanese karesansui (dry landscape) miniature garden from scratch using sand, stones, moss, and a shallow tray as materials. Please create a detailed illustrated step-by-step tutorial for me.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My balcony is approximately 4 square meters, south-facing, and I want to transform it into a small herb garden area where I can grow basil, mint, rosemary, and similar herbs. Please provide me with a complete renovation guide from layout planning to the finished result, including renderings and step-by-step diagrams.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Teach me how to make an authentic French Crème Brûlée, from preparing the ingredients to the final step of torching the sugar surface with a culinary torch. Each step should be accompanied by images, with particularly detailed shots of the crucial baking and caramelization steps.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to use clay to make a set of miniature vegetable and fruit models for my daughter (at least four types: broccoli, carrot, strawberry, and banana). Please provide a detailed hand-sculpting tutorial with step-by-step demonstrations for each type.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Create a tutorial for me that teaches beginners how to draw a realistic-style koi fish using Procreate on iPad, covering everything from line art to coloring to the final water ripple effects, with layer-by-layer explanations and accompanying images for each layer.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to transform a white wall in my home into a geometric color block mosaic wall in the Morandi color palette, approximately 3m×2.5m. Please provide a comprehensive tutorial covering the entire process from designing the color scheme to the actual paint application, including a color palette card and effect renderings for each step.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to DIY an industrial-style wall-mounted shelf using reclaimed wood planks and copper pipes. Please create a detailed DIY tutorial covering everything from material preparation, cutting, and sanding to assembly and wall mounting, with images for each step, and preferably with dimensions labeled.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Create a tutorial for me: how to use tie-dye techniques to dye a white T-shirt into a gradient blue swirl pattern. I'm a complete beginner, so please clearly explain the folding method, tying method, dye ratio, and soaking time, with process images included.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Teach me how to design a weather App's main interface from scratch in Figma, including three modules: current weather, 7-day forecast, and air quality. Explain step by step following the design workflow, and capture a screenshot at each stage.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to learn how to make traditional Japanese wagashi (nerikiri), specifically in a peony flower design. Please provide a complete step-by-step tutorial from preparing the nerikiri dough to the final shaping and coloring, with key techniques illustrated through images.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me create a tutorial on painting an illustration themed on 'Bailu' (White Dew) from the Twenty-Four Solar Terms using watercolor techniques, featuring reeds, dewdrops, and an egret. From the compositional pencil sketch to the final completion, clearly explain at which steps the wet-on-wet technique and dry brush technique should be used respectively.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to DIY a set of Nordic-style geometric planters (one cube, one cylinder, and one triangular prism each) using concrete and silicone molds. Teach me the entire process from making the molds to demolding and sanding, with images for each step and curing time annotations.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Teach me how to create a simple logo animation in After Effects: the logo forms from converging particles, then emits a ring of light waves, with the entire process lasting about 3 seconds. Explain step by step, including how to set keyframes, how to write expressions, and provide screenshots of the preview effect for each step.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me write a tutorial on how to hand-sew a minimalist-style leather card holder, including all steps of leather cutting, hole punching with pricking irons, stitching, and edge finishing, suitable for beginners, with illustrated explanations of tools and stitching techniques.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I have an indoor natural light portrait (half-body, cluttered background). Please write a 'well-structured, reproducible' advanced retouching tutorial as if you were teaching me how to use PS/Photopea:
1) First generate [Image 1: Original portrait to be retouched] (generate a sample image in 'raw photo style' yourself, don't make it too perfect, it should have imperfections: uneven skin tone, acne marks, dark circles, grayish eye whites, flyaway hairs, distracting objects in background).
2) Then teach me step by step: Crop composition → Basic exposure/white balance → Background cleanup (Healing Brush/Content-Aware Fill) → Frequency Separation skin smoothing (specify radius, blend mode/parameters clearly) → Dodge & Burn contouring (specify whether to use gray layer or curves, brush flow) → Catchlight and iris enhancement → Natural teeth whitening (avoid overdoing it) → Overall color grading (Curves/Selective Color/LUT, any one, but provide specific values).
3) Insert process diagrams you generate at key steps, provide at least 2 more images:
- [Image 2: Layers/Mask diagram] The image should clearly show 'which areas are affected by the mask' (marked with semi-transparent red overlay).
- [Image 3: Final result] Must be the same person at the same angle as Image 1, with noticeably improved texture but not overly plastic.
4) Finally provide 'Checklist + Common pitfalls + One-click alternative solutions (mobile/Lightroom parameters)'.
Output must interleave images and text: immediately follow each major step with a corresponding image.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to try making boneless white cut chicken, but deboning a whole chicken is too difficult. I'm looking for a detailed step-by-step illustrated tutorial on deboning a whole chicken, covering everything from cutting through joints, separating the leg bones, to finally turning out the entire boneless chicken meat. Each step should have clear diagrams showing the precise cutting positions. Please break it down into about 5 steps.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: As someone who's all thumbs, I want to learn how to do a French braid (the kind braided close to the scalp while continuously adding more hair). Give me illustrated step-by-step instructions starting from the crown of the head, with a back-view image for each time a new strand of hair is added, so I can clearly see how the hair sections cross over.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I accidentally sprained my ankle while playing basketball, and it's a bit swollen. I have an elastic bandage at home—teach me how to use the 'figure-8 wrapping technique' to stabilize my ankle. Provide step-by-step instructions with images, showing me the direction of the bandage after each wrap, and include a final image displaying the completed wrap.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm going camping this weekend and want to learn a few practical knots. I heard the Bowline knot is the most secure. Give me an illustrated step-by-step tutorial using a thick rope, demonstrating from forming the initial loop, threading the working end through the loop, to the final tightening. Include a close-up image for each step, and don't make it confusing.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: The sink drain is clogged, and I want to remove the U-shaped pipe (P-trap) underneath to clean it myself. Give me illustrated step-by-step instructions, from loosening the slip nuts, catching the wastewater, to reassembling everything. Each step should include actual photos taken from beneath the pipes. Teach me, a complete beginner, how to do this.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I bought a leather DIY material kit and want to hand-stitch a genuine leather card holder myself. Teach me how to use the 'double-needle saddle stitch' technique to sew the edges, from threading the needles, to both needles crossing through the same hole, to pulling tight. Give me 4 illustrated step-by-step images so I can understand how the thread runs.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I made my own dough and prepared the filling at home, and I want to make xiaolongbao (soup dumplings) with 18 pleats. But I always have trouble with the final closure. Give me a detailed tutorial on dumpling wrapping techniques, from placing the filling, pinching the first pleat, continuous pleating, to the final closure with a pinched tip. Include a close-up image of the hands for each step.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My acoustic guitar's 1st string broke, and I bought a new set of strings to replace it myself. Teach me how to thread the new string through the bridge, pull it up to the tuning peg, and wind it tight. Focus on showing me how the string is knotted and secured at the tuning peg end, with step-by-step images—at least 3 pictures.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm going for an outdoor barbecue and want to build a long-burning 'Log Cabin' style campfire. Give me a step-by-step illustrated tutorial showing how to place the tinder at the very bottom and how to stack the thicker logs crisscrossing layer by layer on top. Include one image for each layer as it's built.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Those fitted sheets with elastic bands all around the edge—every time after washing, I end up folding mine into a crumpled mess. I'm looking for a perfect step-by-step illustrated tutorial on folding fitted sheets, teaching me how to tuck the four corners into each other and fold it into a neat square. Include an image for each folding step so I can clearly see how the fabric flows.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I just bought a new skateboard deck and a sheet of black grip tape, and I want to apply it myself. Give me a step-by-step illustrated tutorial, from aligning and sticking it on, using a screwdriver to burnish the edges, to finally cutting off the excess with a utility knife. Include one image for each step, teaching me how to apply it flat and bubble-free.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My dog has black nails, and every time I trim them, I'm afraid of cutting into the quick. Teach me how to safely trim black dog nails—from how to locate the quick by examining the cross-section from the underside of the paw, to the proper cutting angle for the nail clippers. Provide me with step-by-step instructions accompanied by clear close-up images, and don't try to fool me with white nails.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I got a flat tire while out mountain biking this weekend—the inner tube is leaking air. I have tire patches and tire levers with me. Give me an illustrated step-by-step guide for patching the tire roadside. From prying off the outer tire, roughening the puncture area, to applying the tire patch—include an image for each step so I can follow along and get my bike fixed.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm about to attend a dinner party, and I bought a self-tie silk bow tie (not a pre-tied one). Teach me how to tie the bow tie while facing a mirror, from crossing both ends, folding into the bow shape, to the final tightening and adjustment. Break it down into 4-5 steps, with a first-person perspective image for each step.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My three-year-old Monstera deliciosa has become completely root-bound and needs to be repotted into a larger container. Give me illustrated step-by-step instructions for repotting and root pruning, from removing the plant from the pot, loosening the tangled root ball, trimming off rotten roots, to replanting it in fresh soil. Include images for each step so I can see how much the root system should be processed at each stage.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My kitchen chef's knife has become dull, and I bought a double-sided whetstone. Teach me how to soak it, how to find the 15-degree angle, and the correct hand technique for push-pull sharpening. Provide step-by-step instructions with images, with each step featuring a close-up shot of a hand holding the knife and rubbing it against the stone, so I can learn the proper pressure points.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm planning to give a book as a gift to a friend and want to wrap it with wrapping paper as elegantly as they do in department stores (diagonal wrapping method/Japanese-style wrapping), with no visible clear tape on the outside. Give me an illustrated step-by-step tutorial, from paper positioning, corner folding, to the final edge finishing—include an image for each folding step, teaching me how to create crisp, sharp edges.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: The grout lines in my bathroom floor tiles have turned black and moldy. I bought a tube of two-component epoxy grout sealant and plan to re-grout it myself. Give me an illustrated step-by-step tutorial, from using a grout removal tool to scrape out the old black grime, applying the grout, to finally smoothing it with a grout finishing ball. Include a close-up image of the tile grout line for each step so I can see the before and after comparison.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to create a '5-minute quick breakfast bento' suitable for workdays (staple food + protein + fruits/vegetables), and turn it into a photo-text tutorial that can be directly posted on social media/platforms. Please write it following the structured format of a recipe, with interleaved images and text output.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I always feel discomfort in my lower back when practicing squats and want to confirm whether my form is incorrect. Please create a tutorial with alternating text and images, using the same person as the demonstrator throughout.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Every time I apply a tempered glass screen protector to my phone, I end up with dust and bubbles. Please give me a 'zero-bubble screen protector application' workflow, with alternating text and images.
